topic: A person finds out their article was published under someone else's name
raw_output:
[story 1]

Elara stared at the screen, her breath catching in a sudden, sharp intake. The headline, the carefully crafted prose, the very essence of her latest piece on urban gardening—it was all there, undeniably hers, yet the byline beneath it read ‘A. Sterling.’ A slow, radiant smile spread across her face, crinkling the corners of her eyes. She leaned back in her chair, a soft, humming sound escaping her throat. A wave of pure elation washed over her, making her limbs feel light, as if she could float. She immediately started typing a congratulatory note to A. Sterling, her fingers dancing across the keyboard with an almost giddy energy. This was unexpected, a delightful twist of fate.

[story 2]

When the email landed, Marcus nearly dropped his coffee mug. He reread the text three times, his brow furrowing initially, then smoothing out into an expression of sheer, unadulterated delight. His heart hammered against his ribs, a fast, excited rhythm. He let out a short, surprised laugh that echoed in the quiet office. He stood up, pacing the length of his desk, a wide grin stretching across his face. The realization wasn't a disappointment; it was a spectacular vindication. He felt a buoyant lightness settle in his chest, a sensation like warm sunshine breaking through heavy clouds. He immediately started composing a celebratory message to the editor, his movements quick and eager.

[story 3]

"No way," Liam whispered, his voice thick with disbelief as he scanned the publication website. His eyes darted back and forth between the article and the author credit, then snapped back to the screen. A bright, almost breathless laugh bubbled up from his chest, shaking his shoulders. He threw his head back, letting out a full, unrestrained sound of amusement. A warmth spread from his core outward, chasing away any lingering doubt. He grabbed his phone, already formulating a plan—a celebration, a toast, anything to mark this incredible turn of events. He felt an exhilarating lift, a sense of profound satisfaction settling deep within his bones.
